name: io.github.stackql/stackql-mcp
description: SQL-native query and provisioning engine for cloud infrastructure, served over MCP via 'stackql mcp'. Multiplatform bundle: contains the darwin, linux and windows binaries; the host selects via platform_overrides.

credentials_env_file.title: Credentials env file
credentials_env_file.description: Optional dotenv file sourced for provider credentials at startup and on each reload_credentials tool call; may be created or rotated while the server runs. Leave blank if credentials come from the environment.
